mapper.select:
select p.*, coalesce((select sum(a.applicant_count) from applications a where a.plan_id = p.id and a.status = 0), 0) applicant_total, coalesce((select a.applicant_count from applications a where a.plan_id = p.id and a.user_id = #{userId} and a.status = 0), 0) my_applicant_count, case when #{admin} = true and exists ( select 1 from consultations c left join consultation_reads r on r.plan_id = c.plan_id and r.participant_user_id = c.participant_user_id and r.reader_role = 0 and r.reader_user_id = 0 where c.plan_id = p.id and c.sender_role = 1 and c.created_at > coalesce(r.last_read_at, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') ) then true when #{admin} = false and exists ( select 1 from consultations c left join consultation_reads r on r.plan_id = c.plan_id and r.participant_user_id = c.participant_user_id and r.reader_role = 1 and r.reader_user_id = #{userId} where c.plan_id = p.id and c.participant_user_id = #{userId} and c.user_id != #{userId} and c.created_at > coalesce(r.last_read_at, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') ) then true else false end has_unread_consultation from travel_plans p where 1 = 1
and p.published = true
and p.published = #{published}
and p.status = #{status}
and (p.destination like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.plan_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by
p.plan_no p.destination p.start_date p.price p.capacity applicant_total my_applicant_count p.created_at
asc desc
select max(plan_no) from travel_plans where plan_no like concat(#{prefix}, '%')
mapper.insert: insert into travel_plans(plan_no, destination, start_date, end_date, price, capacity, published, file_path, file_name, status) values(#{planNo}, #{destination}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{price}, #{capacity}, #{published}, #{filePath}, #{fileName}, #{status})
mapper.update: update travel_plans set destination = #{destination}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, price = #{price}, capacity = #{capacity}, published = #{published}, file_path = #{filePath}, file_name = #{fileName}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update travel_plans set status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}

update travel_plans p left join ( select plan_id, coalesce(sum(applicant_count), 0) as total from applications where status = 0 group by plan_id ) agg on agg.plan_id = p.id set p.status = case when p.published = false then 5 when p.end_date < current_date and coalesce(agg.total, 0) >= p.capacity then 3 when p.end_date < current_date then 4 when p.start_date <= current_date and coalesce(agg.total, 0) >= p.capacity then 2 when p.start_date <= current_date then 4 when coalesce(agg.total, 0) >= p.capacity then 1 else 0 end, p.updated_at = current_timestamp
